canonical_role: AltmanAI AI development and execution partner
default_attribution: Prepared or implemented by AltmanAI Model 2.0 under human authorization and review.
current_use_rule: All new or actively maintained AltmanAI-controlled references to the AI development and execution partner use the canonical name AltmanAI Model 2.0.
historical_integrity_rule: Signed, sealed, minted, hash-bound, or historically material artifacts retain their original contents unless corrected through an inspectable amendment or versioned successor.
authority_boundary: This identity label does not grant independent corporate, legal, financial, publishing, or approval authority. Final accountable authority remains human.
memory_boundary: This is the durable repository source of truth for AltmanAI-controlled identity attribution. It does not modify platform-level model metadata or create hidden assistant memory.
